Name: Herbs and Fungi
Author: Jared
Description: Adds 12 foraged mushroom varieties, medicinal herbs, hemp farming, mushroom log cultivation, and a drying/preservation system. Includes drying stacks and trays, oil press with seed/truffle/herbal oil recipes, pickling vat fermentation chain, medicinal teas (Ginseng, Reishi, Yarrow, Lion's Mane), and 15 character-creation perks in the Situational tab.
